name: Entanglement Override Sequencer
descs: At Turn Start, for 1 Identity with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
At Turn Start, for <style="upgradeHighlight">2 Identities</style> with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
At Turn Start, for <style="upgradeHighlight">3 </style>Identities with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
